case_title: SAN FRANCISCO TENNIS CLUB VS COLE, BRUCE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,268.23 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO TENNIS CLUB AS TO DEFENDANT COLE, BRUCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COLE, BRUCE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO TENNIS CLUB RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLE, BRUCE $1,268.23 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,323.23 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT COLE, BRUCE
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY DEFENDANT. $14 PAID.
STIPULATION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT.
STIPULATION TO VACATE JUDGMENT SIGNED BY COMMISSIONER. ORDER MAILED TO BOTH PARTIES.
